Are We Done Yet? (2007)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $49,662,533Details
International Box Office $8,725,535
Worldwide Box Office $58,388,068
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $23,891,568
Total $23,891,568
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$14,262,724 (28.7% of total gross)
Legs:3.48 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:85.1% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Theater counts:2,877 opening theaters/2,944 max. theaters, 5.4 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $81,640,002

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: April 4th, 2007 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
Video Release: August 7th, 2007 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG for some innuendos and brief language
Running Time: 92 minutes
Franchise: Are We There Yet?
Cast, crew, or production detail: Remake
Plot point: African Americans, Dysfunctional Family, Pregnant Women, Twins
Subgenre: Family Comedy
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Revolution Studios
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
